testCase.name: Persist question validation accepts a valid import question payload
Persist question validation defaults source to PDF_UPLOAD when omitted
Persist question validation rejects non-PDF_UPLOAD source values
Persist question validation rejects when correctAnswer does not match an option id
Persist question validation rejects questions without text or image
Persist question validation accepts an optional uploadId linking to the source PDF upload
Persist question validation omits uploadId when not provided
